subcodes.first_line: O radiant effulgence! Thy letter was received. 'Abdu'l-Bahá was in the land of Egypt and had no opportunity whatsoever to engage in writing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فروغ پرفروغ نامه شما رسید عبدالبهاء در خطه مصر بود و ابدا فرصت تحریر و
subcodes.subjects: @travels to Egypt by Abdu'l-Baha, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @personal instructions, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
